tests.name: ASCII name and UTF-8 value
tests.cookie: test=1春节回家路·春运完全手册
tests.expected: test=1春节回家路·春运完全手册

tests.name: ASCII name and quoted UTF-8 value
tests.cookie: test="3春节回家路·春运完全手册"
tests.expected: test="3春节回家路·春运完全手册"

tests.name: UTF-8 name and value
tests.cookie: 春节回=4家路·春运完全手册
tests.expected: 春节回=4家路·春运完全手册

tests.name: UTF-8 name and value with semicolon delimiter
tests.cookie: 春节回=6家路·春运; 完全手册
